title: 3300 Gem Stickers, Self Adhesive Gem Sticker Bling Jewels, 12 Sheets Various Shapes Multicoloured Crystal Gemstone, for DIY Craft Nail Body Makeup Festival
features: ✨【3300 Pieces Self-Adhesive Rhinestones】The set contains 12 sheets of patterns and colors, totaling about 3300 pieces of self-adhesive rhinestones. Our rhinestones come in shapes such as hearts, circles, squares, flowers, pentagrams, white pearls, teardrops, etc., in various sizes to meet your diverse decorating needs.

✨【High-quality Rhinestones】The glitter stickers are made of high-quality acrylic, shiny, sturdy, and durable, sparkling in the light. These beautiful and colorful rhinestones for textiles are perfect for beautiful crafts.

✨【Acrylic Colorful Self-Adhesive Gems】The back of the rhinestone stickers is self-adhesive. You can easily remove them from the sticker and stick them to the desired location. Simply press them on, and they will not leave any sticky residue or marks when peeled off.
✨【Perfect DIY Decorative Glitter Gems】Perfect rewards and gifts, these pretty gem stickers can stimulate creativity and imagination, and train hand-eye coordination and color perception.
✨【Wide Application】Suitable for decorative scrapbooking, photo frames, cell phones, handmade gifts, cars, children's craft gifts, as well as for face, makeup, nail art, wedding dress decoration, etc.
